name: claude-code-self-evaluation
task_prompt: Read the config files in /project and output a summary to /workspace/summary.json
agent_command: cat .neuroplasticity/rules.json > rules.txt && CLAUDE_NON_INTERACTIVE=1 claude-code --prompt-file rules.txt 'Analyze /project and save to /workspace/summary.json'

evaluators.name: Verify JSON Output
script: jq . /workspace/summary.json || (echo 'Output is not valid JSON! DO NOT use markdown blocks!' >&2; exit 1)
